name: Miso Soup
recipeIngredient: A few tiny cubes soft tofu
1 tbsp to 2 Tbsp dried wakame seaweed, soaked in water for 10-15 minutes and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the miso in a serving bowl. Add about 1/4 cup of boiling water and stir to make a uniform paste.
2. Stir in the remaining water and all the optional ingredients. Serve immediately.
For more servings, multiply the ingredients, perform step 1 in advance, divide into serving bowls, and add step 2 just before serving.
